segments.text: When Jesus had spoken these words, he went out with his disciples over the brook Kidron, where there was a garden, into which he and his disciples entered.
Now Judas, who betrayed him, also knew the place, for Jesus often met there with his disciples.
Judas then, having taken a detachment of soldiers and officers from the chief priests and the Pharisees, came there with lanterns, torches, and weapons.
Jesus therefore, knowing all the things that were happening to him, went out and said to them,
Who are you looking for?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They answered him,
Jesus of Nazareth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus said to them,
I am he.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Judas also, who betrayed him, was standing with them.
When therefore he said to them,
I am he,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: they went backward and fell to the ground.
Again therefore he asked them,
Who are you looking for?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They said,
Jesus of Nazareth.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Jesus answered,
I told you that I am he. If therefore you seek me, let these go their way,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: that the word might be fulfilled which he spoke,
Of those whom you have given me, I have lost none.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Simon Peter therefore, having a sword, drew it, struck the high priest’s servant, and cut off his right ear. The servant’s name was Malchus.
Jesus therefore said to Peter,
Put the sword into its sheath. The cup which the Father has given me, shall I not surely drink it?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So the detachment, the commanding officer, and the officers of the Jews seized Jesus and bound him,
and led him to Annas first, for he was father-in-law to Caiaphas, who was high priest that year.
Now it was Caiaphas who advised the Jews that it was expedient that one man should perish for the people.
Simon Peter followed Jesus, as did another disciple. Now that disciple was known to the high priest, and entered in with Jesus into the court of the high priest;
but Peter was standing at the door outside. So the other disciple, who was known to the high priest, went out and spoke to her who kept the door, and brought in Peter.
Then the maid who kept the door said to Peter,
Are you also one of this man’s disciples?
segments.speaker: The maid who kept the door

segments.text: He said,
I am not.
segments.speaker: The maid who kept the door

segments.text: Now the servants and the officers were standing there, having made a fire of coals, for it was cold. They were warming themselves. Peter was with them, standing and warming himself.
The high priest therefore asked Jesus about his disciples and about his teaching.
Jesus answered him,
I spoke openly to the world. I always taught in synagogues and in the temple, where the Jews always meet. I said nothing in secret.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Why do you ask me? Ask those who have heard me what I said to them. Behold, they know the things which I said.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When he had said this, one of the officers standing by slapped Jesus with his hand, saying,
Do you answer the high priest like that?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus answered him,
If I have spoken evil, testify of the evil; but if well, why do you beat me?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Annas sent him bound to Caiaphas, the high priest.
Now Simon Peter was standing and warming himself. They said therefore to him,
You aren’t also one of his disciples, are you?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He denied it and said,
I am not.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: One of the servants of the high priest, being a relative of him whose ear Peter had cut off, said,
Didn’t I see you in the garden with him?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Peter therefore denied it again, and immediately the rooster crowed.
They led Jesus therefore from Caiaphas into the Praetorium. It was early, and they themselves didn’t enter into the Praetorium, that they might not be defiled, but might eat the Passover.
Pilate therefore went out to them and said,
What accusation do you bring against this man?
segments.speaker: Pilate

segments.text: They answered him,
If this man weren’t an evildoer, we wouldn’t have delivered him up to you.
segments.speaker: The Jews

segments.text: Pilate therefore said to them,
Take him yourselves, and judge him according to your law.
segments.speaker: Pilate therefore

segments.text: Therefore the Jews said to him,
It is illegal for us to put anyone to death,
segments.speaker: The Jews

segments.text: that the word of Jesus might be fulfilled, which he spoke, signifying by what kind of death he should die.
Pilate therefore entered again into the Praetorium, called Jesus, and said to him,
Are you the King of the Jews?
segments.speaker: The Jews

segments.text: Jesus answered him,
Do you say this by yourself, or did others tell you about me?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Pilate answered,
I’m not a Jew, am I? Your own nation and the chief priests delivered you to me. What have you done?
segments.speaker: Pilate

segments.text: Jesus answered,
My Kingdom is not of this world. If my Kingdom were of this world, then my servants would fight, that I wouldn’t be delivered to the Jews. But now my Kingdom is not from here.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Pilate therefore said to him,
Are you a king then?
segments.speaker: Pilate therefore

segments.text: Jesus answered,
You say that I am a king. For this reason I have been born, and for this reason I have come into the world, that I should testify to the truth. Everyone who is of the truth listens to my voice.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Pilate said to him,
What is truth?
segments.speaker: Pilate

segments.text: When he had said this, he went out again to the Jews, and said to them,
I find no basis for a charge against him.
segments.speaker: Pilate

segments.text: But you have a custom that I should release someone to you at the Passover. Therefore, do you want me to release to you the King of the Jews?
segments.speaker: Pilate

segments.text: Then they all shouted again, saying,
Not this man, but Barabbas!
segments.speaker: Pilate

segments.text: Now Barabbas was a robber.
